relationships.weight: Farming communities are showing growing interest in pigeonpea.
Pigeonpea is being researched and promoted in the Philippines.
ICRISAT is conducting research and development on pigeonpea.
The R&D work focuses on pigeonpea.
The R&D work aims to facilitate commercialization of pigeonpea.
